scripts.fetch-calendar: rm -f events.db && wget $(curl -s https://api.github.com/repos/del-today/dataset/releases/latest | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin)['assets'][0]['browser_download_url'])") -O events.db
scripts.stat: sqlite3 --header --csv  events.db "SELECT substr(url, 9, instr(substr(url, 9), '/') - 1) AS domain, COUNT(*) as count FROM events GROUP by domain ORDER BY count DESC"
